title: System Automation Defaults
description: Schema for `system.automation_defaults` namespace. v1 — minimal structural coverage. Full parameter list lives in SystemAutomationSettingsCatalog and is out of Phase 1 scope; detailed schema extracted in later phases when Python-side consumers are known.
